Designer.title: Designer
Designer.description: Represents a designer who uses the FurniVision application to create and manage furniture designs for clients.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Designer entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the designer.

lastName.description: The last name of the designer.

email.description: The email address of the designer, used for contact and potentially login (authentication handled by an external system).

registrationDate.description: The date and time when the designer's account was created.

FurnitureItem.title: FurnitureItem
FurnitureItem.description: Represents a catalog item of furniture that can be selected and placed in a room design.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FurnitureItem entity.

name.description: The common name of the furniture item (e.g., 'Eames Lounge Chair', 'Modern Dining Table').

description.description: A detailed description of the furniture item, including its style, materials, and features.

category.description: The category the furniture item belongs to (e.g., 'Chairs', 'Tables', 'Sofas', 'Storage').

manufacturer.description: The manufacturer or brand of the furniture item.

defaultWidthCm.description: The default width of the furniture item in centimeters.

defaultHeightCm.description: The default height of the furniture item in centimeters.

defaultDepthCm.description: The default depth of the furniture item in centimeters.

baseColor.description: The default color of the furniture item, typically a hex code or common color name.

thumbnailUrl.description: A URL to a thumbnail image of the furniture item for catalog display.

Design.title: Design
Design.description: Represents a specific furniture arrangement and visualization created by a designer for a particular room context.

definition.description: Stores individual designer profiles. Each document represents a designer and is owned by the Firebase authenticated user with the matching UID. Authorization is based on 'request.auth.uid == designerId'.
Stores a global catalog of available furniture items. This collection is read-only for all authenticated designers, serving as public product data.
Stores furniture designs created and owned by a specific designer. The 'designerId' field within the document, along with path-based ownership, ensures authorization independence.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for FurniVision is simplified to prioritize rapid development and align with the existing UI components. It uses a denormalized approach for designs, embedding room and furniture data directly within each design document. This avoids complex client-side joins and simplifies data management for the MVP.

- **Authorization:** A path-based ownership model is maintained for all designer-specific data. All designer-created documents are stored under `/designers/{designerId}`, allowing security rules to enforce ownership by checking `request.auth.uid == designerId`.
- **Data Model:** The `Design` entity contains all necessary information for rendering a single design, including `room` specifications and an array of `furniture` placements. This denormalization simplifies fetching data for the design editor, requiring only a single document read. A separate `furnitureCatalog` collection remains for globally accessible furniture types, which is read-only for clients.
